2605.07733.title: Intelligent Truck Matching in Full Truckload Shipments using Ping2Hex approach
2605.07733.paper_summary: Accurate truck-to-shipment matching using GPS data is foundational for full truckload supply chain visibility, enabling real-time tracking and accurate estimated time of arrival (ETA) predictions. However, missing or corrupted vehicle identifiers prevent traditional matching approaches, leaving shipments without visibility. This paper presents Intelligent Truck Matching (ITM) 2.0, a machine learning system that addresses this critical gap by formulating matching as a probabilistic ranking problem. Our approach leverages Uber H3 hexagonal spatial indexing to discretize GPS pings into route similarity features, combined with temporal information, then applies LightGBM gradient boosting with threshold-based post-processing. Through rigorous evaluation including offline model selection (SVM, XGBoost, LightGBM), comprehensive ablation studies, and production shadow testing, we demonstrate substantial gains over rule-based baselines. ITM 2.0 achieves 26 percentage point precision improvement in North America and 14 points in Europe, while doubling coverage. Deployed in production at Project44 handling full truckload shipments, the system demonstrates robustness to geocoding errors up to 1 km, multiple candidate trucks, and sparse pings.
2605.07733.paper_summary_zh: 精確的卡車與貨物匹配利用 GPS 數據，對於實現完整的卡車負載供應鏈可見性至關重要，能夠實現實時追蹤和準確的預估到達時間 (ETA) 預測。<lb/>然而，缺失或損壞的車輛識別碼阻礙了傳統的匹配方法，使得貨物無法可見。<lb/>本文提出了智能卡車匹配 (ITM) 2.0，一個通過將匹配形式化為概率排名問題來解決這一關鍵缺口的機器學習系統。<lb/>我們的方法利用 Uber H3 六邊形空間索引將 GPS 信號離散化為路徑相似性特徵，並結合時間信息，然後應用 LightGBM 梯度提升及基於閾值的後處理。<lb/>通過嚴格的評估，包括離線模型選擇 (SVM, XGBoost, LightGBM)、全面的消融研究和生產影子測試，我們展示了相對於基於規則的基準的顯著增益。<lb/>ITM 2.0 在北美實現了 26 個百分點的精確度提升，在歐洲提升了 14 個百分點，同時覆蓋範圍翻倍。<lb/>該系統已在 Project44 的生產環境中部署，處理完整的卡車負載貨物，顯示出對於高達 1 公里的地理編碼錯誤、多個候選卡車和稀疏信號的穩健性。
2605.07733.author: Srinivas Kumar R et.al.
2605.07733.authors: Srinivas Kumar R, Jose Mathew, Ankit Singh Chauhan, Dinesh Rajkumar, Aravind Manoj, Mohit Goel
